_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure the integration and implementation of Cross-Domain Solutions (CDS) in a secure environment.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-003 (DG, cosine: 0.381), DG-T-013 (DG, cosine: 0.374).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.401). Shared vocabulary: [cross]. DCWF-only terms [cds, domain, ensure, environment, implementation, integration] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, data, delivery, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.873, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Ensure the integration and implementation of Cross-Domain Solutions (CDS) in a s" and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.388 ≈ STS 0.401 (gap 0.013). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cross] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [cross]. DCWF-only: [cds, domain, ensure, environment, implementation, integration]. WIDAI-only: [ability, build, business, data, delivery, effective].
